nodes.name: Iberian chiffchaff
nodes.summary: Iberian chiffchaff（Iberian chiffchaff，学名 Phylloscopus ibericus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 比利牛斯山脉
nodes.summary: 比利牛斯山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Iberian chiffchaff，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It winters in Western Africa south of the Sahara Desert

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the Iberian Peninsula it breeds in the west and north, the northern Spanish population breeds from Galicia to Navarre in the Pyrenees, with a small number breeding in the Pyrénées-Atlantiques in France with separate scattered populations in the mountains of southern Spain

links.label: 分布于

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Portugal it is mainly found in Trás-os-Montes and Alto Douro in the north with another separate population in southern Portugal from Estremadura south to the Algarve. It also breeds in northern Morocco. It is found in humid areas, being assocuiated with riparian habitats in the south, although in the north they are found in a deciduous woodland with well-developed undergrowth and are less dependant on riparian habitats
